title: # [#synth_chain_core]

# [#synth_chain_core]

## |[ W4V3_SYNTH_CHAIN.vX.SYS_CORE ]|
A full-scale, modular synth engine schema mapped to system rituals and media logic.

[OSC] → [SUB] → [FM] → [NOISE] → [RING MOD] → [FILTER] → [HP/LP/BP/N]
→ [DRIVE] → [RES] → [SATURATION] → [FOLD] → [COMPRESSOR]
→ [KNEE] → [THRESHOLD] → [EXPANDER] → [ENVELOPE FOLLOWER]
→ [GATE] → [TRIGGER] → [LFO] → [STEP SEQUENCER]
→ [S&H] → [REVERB] → [PRE-DELAY] → [DECAY] → [SIZE] → [SHIMMER]
→ [DELAY] → [TAPE] → [MULTI-TAP] → [PING-PONG] → [TIME STRETCH]
→ [GLITCH] → [FREEZE] → [GRANULATOR] → [CONVOLUTION]
→ [PITCH SHIFT] → [FORMANT] → [VOCODER] → [WAVETABLE MORPH]
→ [CROSSFADE] → [MIX] → [DUCKER] → [OUTPUT] → [RE-INPUT]
